name: Nestle Mint Pattie- 20g
description:
Nestle Mint Pattie – 20g of Cool Minty Goodness!

At Sweets World, we bring you delicious treats from around the world, and the Nestle Mint Pattie is a small but mighty classic you’ll love! This refreshing snack combines smooth dark chocolate with a cool, creamy mint centre – the perfect balance of rich and refreshing in every bite.

The Nestle Mint Pattie – 20g is just the right size for a quick treat during your busy day. Whether you need a little pick-me-up at work, something sweet after lunch, or a cool treat to enjoy on the go, this minty chocolate delight does the job perfectly.

Wrapped neatly for freshness and convenience, it fits easily in your pocket, bag, or lunchbox. The dark chocolate coating is smooth and slightly bitter, which pairs wonderfully with the sweet and creamy mint filling inside. It’s a simple, classic flavour combo that never goes out of style.

If you’re a fan of mint and chocolate together, the Nestle Mint Pattie is a must-try. It’s also a great option if you want a lighter, refreshing treat that doesn’t feel too heavy.

At Sweets World, we’re proud to offer timeless favourites like this, bringing joy and flavour in every bite. So, next time you’re craving a cool and chocolatey treat, pick up a Nestle Mint Pattie and enjoy that perfect minty moment!
